title: Call for help: more hands at trail work days
short: Lately we’ve been too few on work days, while there’s always more to do.
long:
Every pair of hands is useful, come help and together we will do a lot. We have the tools, the meet-up is always simple, and we adapt the pace to the team.

The goal is well-maintained, safe trails with minimal impact on the environment.

title: Trail Maintenance for Upcoming Races
alt: TCS Trail Maintenance for Upcoming Races
short: Over the weekends and not only, the **TCS crew** will work intensively on **preparing the trails** for the upcoming April competitions.
long: Over the weekends and not only, the **TCS crew** will work intensively on **preparing the trails** for the upcoming April competitions. Maintenance will took place on the slopes of **Škabrijel** and **Sveta Gora**. Most stages will follow existing paths with minor adjustments. The biggest highlight is the new "Power Stage" for the E-MTB European Cup, located near the main event area, on the opposite bank of the Soča River.

id: Registrations for the European E-MTB Enduro Cup is open
title: Registrations for the European E-MTB Enduro Cup is open
short: Registrations for the **European E-MTB Enduro Cup is open** | Nova Gorica | April 18th-19th 2026, part of **SloEnduro TCS Nova Gorica**.
long:
**SloEnduro TCS Nova Gorica**, will open the season 2026 on April 18th and 19th with a race that will also count as the **European e-MTB Enduro Tour** in the Elite and Open categories. The event, organized by the **TCS association**, will take place on the slopes of Škabrijel, Skalnica and Sabotin.

Registrations are open until April 9th, 2026.

More info: [www.sloenduro.com/european-e-mtb-enduro-tour-nova-gorica-2026/?lang=en](url)

id: Registrations for SloEnduro TCS Nova Gorica are open | Nova Gorica | April 18-19, 2026
title: Registrations for SloEnduro TCS Nova Gorica are open
short:
Registrations for **SloEnduro TCS Nova Gorica** are open | Nova Gorica | April 18th-19th 2026.
The first race of the SloEnduro series this year!
long:
**SloEnduro TCS Nova Gorica** starts on April 18th- 19th!

The event, organized by the **TCS Association**, will take place on the slopes of **Škabrijel**, **Skalnica** and **Sabotin**.

Enduro spectacle in the vicinity of Nova Gorica!

The upcoming event over the Goriška capital, will take the competitors to three different peaks, where steep and technically advanced descents await them, which are strongly reminiscent of alpine cycling. To test the endurance of the participants, one of the stages will last more than six minutes, which requires top physical fitness.

This year's event is particularly significant because of the following highlights:
**International participation:** In addition to points for the domestic SloEnduro Cup, the race will be part of the European e-MTB Enduro Tour series.
**Saturday's program:** e-riders will compete on two special "power stage" tests on the first day.
**Logistics and regeneration:** the main gathering point with refreshments, will be located on Sunday at the Kekec Restaurant, where the cyclists will regain their energy, during the individual parts of the race.

**Registrations are open until April 13th 2026.**

More info at: [www.sloenduro.com/sloenduro-tcs-nova-gorica-2026/?lang=en](url)

title: SloEnduro TCS Nova Gorica 2026- registrations are closed
short:
SloEnduro record alert! 
352 riders are set to hit the trails!
long:
🚨 SloEnduro record alert! 

352 riders are set to hit the trails in Nova Gorica this weekend – the biggest turnout in SloEnduro history! 💥

📅 Saturday: Come see the action kick off with open practice sessions and the E-MTB Power Stages race⚡️ – where the strongest legs and watts make the difference.

🏁 Sunday: The main TCS SloEnduro race brings the best enduro racers from across the region to battle it out on our home trails. Expect speed, skill, and good vibes all day.

👀 Spectators welcome! Find your favorite spot, cheer loud, and be part of the biggest SloEnduro ever!

id: TCS Gravity in full lineup at the first SloEnduro race in Nova Gorica!
title: TCS Gravity in full lineup at the first SloEnduro race in Nova Gorica!
short: TCS Gravity in full lineup at the first SloEnduro race in Nova Gorica!
long:
TCS Gravity in full lineup at the first SloEnduro race in Nova Gorica! 🤘🔥 

This weekend we open the season in style. A real cycling spectacle awaits us, as there are as many as 352 competitors from all categories on the start list! 🏁 

In addition to the SloEnduro series, the European E-bike series will feature: 
⚡️ Kristjan Medvešček 
⚡️ Nejc Rutar (who after a break of several years is reactivating just for this race!) 

Ready for adrenaline and fast lines. See you at the track! 🚵‍♂️💨

id: Nova Gorica hosted a mountain bike enduro spectacle
title: Nova Gorica hosted a mountain bike enduro spectacle: the Italian Vendemmia and the French Dailly reigned supreme at SloEnduro TCS
short: This weekend, the slopes above Nova Gorica and Solkan turned into the center of European mountain biking. The TCS association successfully held the **SloEnduro TCS Nova Gorica** race, which was not only considered a Slovenian cup, but also hosted the opening test of the prestigious **European e-MTB Enduro Tour** series.
long:
Nova Gorica hosted a mountain bike enduro spectacle: the Italian Vendemmia and the French Dailly reigned supreme at SloEnduro TCS! 

**A venue that inspires** 
The organizers from the TCS Society prepared a route with a total of up to 2100 meters of ascent, which included technical sections on Sabotin and attractive descents towards Solkan. The sunny weather attracted many spectators to the venue, who accompanied the performances of 350 competitors from more than ten countries. 


**The Italian prevail in the classic enduro, Peršak on the podium**
In the men's elite category of classic enduro, the Italian **Mirco Vendemmia** (AB Gravity Team) celebrated after demanding speed tests on , including cross-border routes. He confirmed his superiority by winning all stages and with a total time of 16:47.91. The best Slovenian was, as expected, **Vid Peršak** (Rajd Ljubljana), who took an excellent **3rd place. place**, but 33 seconds behind the winner. Hungarian Áron Babó won second place. 

**SloEnduro TCS (Elite M) results:**
1. Mirco Vendemmia (ITA) 16:47.91
2. Áron Babó (HUN) +0:29.04 
3. **Vid Peršak (SLO) +0:33.61**


**French domination of electric bikes** 
As part of the European tour, Nova Gorica hosted a stellar line-up in the **E-bike Elite** category. The victory went to France and the best Slovenian representative was Tim Jež in 15th place. 

**E-bike Elite Results (Men):** 
1. **Adrien Dailly** (FRA, Mustache SR Suntour) – 26:06.60 
2. **Andrea Garibbo** (ITA, Team Haibike) – +0:05.11 
3. **Théo Ruhlmann** (FRA, Rotwild Schwalbe Gravity) – +0:43.02 


More:[](https://www.sloenduro.com)
